name: GTM CRM Export Handoff
description: One approved bounded export with a safe job ref, a retained StackOS artifact when complete, and truthful pending, partial, or failed evidence.
audience: Revenue operations teams requesting bounded HubSpot CRM data exports
problem: CRM exports can leak excessive customer data or create duplicate async jobs when scope, authority, polling, and retention are left implicit.
outcome: One approved bounded export with a safe job ref, a retained StackOS artifact when complete, and truthful pending, partial, or failed evidence.
whyAi: AI can validate and reconcile the export lifecycle while the provider action and StackOS artifact boundary own execution and data handling.
operatorPath: Choose one supported CRM object type, exact safe property refs, format, and retention policy.
Review data scope and approve creation of the provider export job.
Receive either the completed artifact or a safe pending/repair handoff.
agentPath: Validate the bounded export plan and reject raw provider ids or unnecessary fields.
Start the job once with a stable export key.
Poll by safe job ref, consume the short-lived result internally, and reconcile artifact evidence.
recovery: If provider state is pending, retain the safe job ref and next poll guidance without starting another export.
If result download is partial or fails, reuse the same job and action evidence rather than creating a replacement job.
safeStoppingPoints: Stop before provider creation when scope or export authority is incomplete.
Stop with a safe pending handoff when the provider job is not complete.
prerequisites: A HubSpot OAuth connection with the Bulk capability bundle
A supported object type and provider-verified property refs
Explicit export authority, a stable export key, and a retention policy
proof: Safe async job and action-call refs
StackOS artifact ref or truthful pending/repair guidance
whenToUse: One bounded HubSpot contacts, companies, deals, leads, products, or line-items dataset must be exported for an approved purpose.

stages.title: Validate Export Intent
stages.summary: Read the bounded export request, prior export state, and recent action evidence before any provider call.

stages.title: Start Approved Export
stages.summary: Start exactly one provider export after explicit data-scope approval.

stages.title: Reconcile And Retrieve Export
stages.summary: Poll by safe job ref and, when complete, consume the provider result into the StackOS-managed artifact boundary.

stages.title: Record Export Handoff
stages.summary: Store the durable export index and retention disposition for completed, pending, partial, blocked, or failed outcomes.
